summary: Mobile responsiveness testing completed for Davwo Energy platform. All 13 features tested and passing. Mobile viewport (375px) shows compact logo, hamburger menu with all 5 nav links, vertically stacked content. Desktop viewport (1920px) maintains original Tesla-like layout with large logo and horizontal navigation.

issues: Minor console warning: 'Received true for a non-boolean attribute jsx' - not user-facing, low priority

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile responsiveness fully tested. All pages work correctly on both mobile (375px) and desktop (1920px) viewports. IntersectionObserver scroll animations work correctly - elements fade in when entering viewport and stay visible once revealed.

navbar.mobile_menu_navigation: PASS - Can navigate to all 5 pages

home_page.content_visible_without_scroll: PASS - Main heading at y=194px (within viewport)
home_page.buttons_stack_vertically: PASS - flex-col class active, buttons stacked

navbar.horizontal_nav_visible: PASS - 5 nav links in horizontal layout

navigation.all_5_pages: PASS - HOME, PLATFORM ARCHITECTURE, PROGRAMME, ABOUT, CONTACT

scroll_animations.intersection_observer_works: PASS - Elements fade in when entering viewport
scroll_animations.elements_stay_visible: PASS - Once revealed, elements don't fade back out
scroll_animations.platform_architecture_elements: PASS - 13/13 elements revealed and stay visible
